healthcare.label: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Healthcare includes hospitals, Medicare, Medicaid, and public health services.

education.label: Education
education.description: Education covers public schools, universities, student loans, and research grants.

defence.label: Defence
defence.description: Defence includes the military, national security, and veteran benefits.

infrastructure.label: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Infrastructure covers roads, bridges, public transit, water systems, and broadband.

welfare.label: Welfare
welfare.description: Welfare includes Social Security, unemployment benefits, housing assistance, and food programs.

admin.label: Government Admin
admin.description: Government Administration covers federal agencies, justice, and general operations.

other.label: Other
other.description: Other includes international aid, environmental programs, arts, and science.
